narrative:
Southington Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 883 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.8 percentage points.
